ObjectStates.Name: Custom_Tile
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
btColor = {r=1, g=0, b=0}
targetObj = nil
function onLoad()
    self.createInput({
        label="seconds", position={0, 0.21, 0.26}, height=200, width=800, scale={0.5, 0.5, 0.5}, font_size=140, font_color={0, 0, 0}, alignment=3,
        color={1, 1, 1}, value=cdg, tooltip="# of seconds", input_function="input_time", function_owner=self,
    })

    self.createButton({position={x=0, y=0.21, z=0.55}, width=800, height=250, scale={0.5, 0.5, 0.5}, color={0, 0.8, 0}, 
        click_function='runScript', function_owner=self, tooltip='Set Timer', label="SET TIMER"})
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '3g4u8gt347y'..self.guid then
            objs[i].destroyObject()
        end
    end

    makeZone()
end

function input_time(_, color, inputString, stillEditing)
    return
end

function onEndEdit(player, value, id)
    self.UI.setAttribute('if', 'text', value)
    scriptStr = value
end

function runScript(obj, player_color, alt_click)
    if alt_click == true then return end
    local zobj = nil
    local pos = self.getPosition()
    local sz = self.getBounds().size
    pos.y = pos.y + sz.y + 1
    sz.y = sz.y + 2
    if targetObj == nil then
        makeZone()
    end
    targetObj.setPosition(pos)
    targetObj.setScale(sz)

    Wait.frames(function()
        setTimer()
    end, 20)
end

function onDestroy()
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '3g4u8gt347y'..self.guid then
            objs[i].destroyObject()
        end
    end
end

function makeZone()
    local pos = self.getPosition()
    local sz = self.getBounds().size
    pos.y = pos.y + sz.y + 1
    sz.y = sz.y + 2
    if targetObj == nil then
        local spawnParams = {
            type = 'ScriptingTrigger',
            position = {0, 500, 0},
            scale = sz,
        }
        targetObj = spawnObject(spawnParams)
        targetObj.setName('3g4u8gt347y'..self.guid)
    end
end

function setTimer()
    local inputs = self.getInputs()
    if inputs and inputs[1] then
        local timeValue = inputs[1].value
        if tonumber(timeValue) == nil then
            return
        end
        local tobj = targetObj.getObjects()
        for i = 1, #tobj do
            if tobj[i] ~= self then
                local scr = tobj[i].getLuaScript()
                local sw1 = nil
                local sw2 = nil
                if string.find(scr, '= countdownGoal') or string.find(scr, '=countdownGoal') then
                    sw1 = 1
                end
                if string.find(scr, 'countdownGoal =') or string.find(scr, 'countdownGoal=') then
                    sw2 = 1
                end
                if sw1 and sw2 then
                    tobj[i].setVar('countdownGoal', tonumber(timeValue))
                    tobj[i].call('click_reset')
                    tobj[i].clearInputs()
                    tobj[i].call('createTimeInputs')
                    return
                end
            end
        end
    end
end
